title: P1 review fix: partial-unprovable apply_patch matrix rows + corrective-stderr assertions
action: Close review finding F1 (P1) and F5 (P3) from the test-coverage report: (1) add matrix rows where an apply_patch envelope mixes PROVABLE and UNPROVABLE targets (e.g. one valid repo-relative Add plus one blank-path Update; one valid Update plus one outside-repo Move destination) asserting the WHOLE request denies exit 2 — pinning bee-write-guard.mjs's relPaths.length < targets.length branch; (2) strengthen unprovable-deny rows 19-22 to also assert the corrective FIX-bearing stderr, not just exit 2. Test-only cell: bee-write-guard.mjs itself must NOT change; if a new row exposes a real guard bug, report [BLOCKED] with the failing row verbatim.

truths: a mixed provable+unprovable patch denies as a whole (both orderings: provable-first and unprovable-first)
zero existing rows weakened; bee-write-guard.mjs untouched

trace.outcome: Closed F1 (P1) and F5 (P3) from the test-coverage review: added rows 27-29 pinning the partial-unprovable whole-deny branch (bee-write-guard.mjs:176) in both target orderings plus the outside-repo-Move-destination combo, and strengthened unprovable-deny rows 19-22 to also assert the corrective FIX-bearing stderr. bee-write-guard.mjs untouched; no rows weakened or deleted.
